hooks.command: changed_dirs=$({ git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null; } | sed 's|/.*||' | sort -u); for dir in $changed_dirs; do if [ -f "$dir/package.json" ] && grep -q '"format"' "$dir/package.json" 2>/dev/null; then echo "=== $dir: format ==="; npm run format --workspace=$dir 2>&1 | tail -3; echo "=== $dir: format:check ==="; npm run format:check --workspace=$dir 2>&1 | tail -5; echo "=== $dir: lint ==="; npm run lint --workspace=$dir 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; done
